name: Marco Antonio Muñiz
abstract: Marco Antonio Muñiz Vega (born 3 March 1933) is a Mexican singer from Jalisco, Mexico. Known across Latin America, he also acted in the 1965 film Sinful (Spanish: El Pecador).

concerts.label: Recuerdos: Danny Rivera and Michel Camilo
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage
